issues.description: Condition missing: requires checking 'you have 3 or more Characters'. Current condition is 'Always' but should include a character count check (e.g., HasCardOnBoard with count parameter or custom condition).
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which means the boost applies only while it's your turn, not permanently until end of turn.
